title: Dynamically show the images from static folder

content.problemStatement:
In this last lesson we will use the static folder to show the images in our gallery website and use css stored in static folder.

### Tasks:

1. Complete `main.py` to show all the photos in the gallery and another api to show the details of the particular image

2. Complete the `photo.html` to show the details of the image

3. Complete the `gallery.html`
